arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Liverpool – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham host Carabao Cup holders Liverpool on Wednesday night in the first leg of their Carabao Cup semi-final. In the last round, Ange Postecoglou’s outfit were on the positive side of a 4-3 thriller against Manchester United to advance into the last four.
